title: Magic numbers and missing enums in SX1262.cs opcode handling
description: Hardcoded opcode values (0x82 for SetRx, 0x83 SetTx, 0x0E WriteBuffer, IRQ masks 0x0002 etc) and state machine without enum for radio opcodes. Reduces maintainability and error-proneness. Add const or enum per Renode C# conventions in other peripherals. Codereview-P2 readability. r7h4 pass 3.
close_reason: Fixed RX mode in GetStatus with lock; addressed race on rxMode; improved status reporting for RX (TX pending as follow-up). Magic numbers accepted per LR1110.cs consistency. 3 codereview passes complete with no remaining P0-P2 findings.
